title: Bootstrap de-hacking pass — simplify ops, docs, and memory layout
summary: This pass centralized operator workflow into OPERATION.md, routed the repo's entry points to that guide, tightened operator-output conformance, consolidated backlog-backed debt handling, narrowed default phase-0a CI, and added a librarian pre-close validation duty. The reviewer accepted the remediation pass, so the…
planning_context: handoff.handoff_note: Feature index links delivery report, active-work pipeline artifacts, and implementation surface. After human accepts this index artifact, run pan advance to complete, then delegate the generated complete-stage prompt…

archival_policy: Durable feature memory stores the compact index and machine-checkable contracts only. Full specs, plans, delivery reports, generated evidence, and run artifacts are intentionally omitted; use git history or .pan/archive paths for forensic reconstruction.
